title: LongitudinalReinforcement
description: LongitudinalReinforcement: Defines any longitudinal reinforcement along a Bar.

RebarLayout.description: Layout controlling the distribution of the rebars across the SectionProperty. ILayout2D: Base interface for all 2D layouts

Diameter.description: Diameter of a single rebar. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

StartLocation.description: Normalised length (0 means start, 1 means end) along the element where the rebars start.

EndLocation.description: Normalised length (0 means start, 1 means end) along the element where the rebars ends.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
